tags.name: Air Wall
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Wall confirmed by multiple sources. oceans5dive.com: wall from 8m to 30m between Gili Air and Gili Meno; bluemarlindive.com: 18m avg, 28m max. Depth updated to 28m per bluemarlindive.com. Fabricated marine life (bumphead parrotfish, rare gorgonians, pygmy seahorses) stripped from markdown — no site-specific source confirms these at Air Wall specifically.

tags.name: Bounty
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-08: Vessel was a pontoon/floating pier for Gili Meno jetty construction. Sank in 2001 storm, not "developing a hole". Lies 8-18m depth. Sources: divecentralgili.com, trawangandive.com, terumbudivers.com confirm storm sinking.

tags.name: Deep Turbo
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Confirmed as Advanced pinnacle/seamount. trawangandive.com: 16-30m, Advanced OW+. oceans5dive.com: sea mounds with garden eels, depth 30m. bluemarlindive.com: Turbo (deep/shallow) 22m avg, 32m max. Marine life: batfish, red-tooth triggerfish, snapper, blue-spotted rays, sharks, pygmy seahorses, nudibranchs confirmed by trawangandive.com.

tags.name: Frog Fish Point
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: site_type updated from reef to muck — the site name and description indicate a macro/muck diving focus (frogfish on sandy substrate). No 3-source validation found for specific site details beyond the name. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Halik
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Drift confirmed by multiple operators. bluemarlindive.com: Halik 15-40m range, reef with bommies and gorgonian fans. oceans5dive.com: steep slope with gullies, excellent drift, max 20m shallow section. gilidivers.com: big bommies, baby whitetip reef sharks, turtles, barrel sponges, eagle rays. Depth updated to 40m (bluemarlindive.com deep section). Intermediate for shallow sections; advanced for deep 40m section.

tags.name: Jack Point
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Drift type plausible for west Gili Trawangan headland but no specific 3-source validation found for this site name. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Malang
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Also known as Takat Malang. bluemarlindive.com: 20m avg, 40m max, large coral heads with overhangs and swim-throughs. trawangandive.com lists as one of top advanced sites. Site type updated from reef to pinnacle (large rock/coral formations — Takats). Depth 40m confirmed, Advanced difficulty confirmed.

tags.name: Manta Point
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: No 3-source validation found for this specific site as 'Manta Point' near Lombok. Possible confusion with other sites. Manta sightings referenced in Sunset Reef (trawangandive.com) and general south channel — seasonal. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Meno Corner
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Corrected site_type from drift to reef. manta-dive-giliair.com describes as 'patch reef with gently sloping valley,' 'calm conditions even when rough elsewhere' — not a drift site. Oceans5dive.com confirms slope. Depth corrected to 30m (max per manta-dive-giliair.com). Difficulty set to Beginner — manta-dive-giliair.com explicitly lists as suitable for Try Scuba Diving and OW courses.

tags.name: Meno Slope
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Confirmed as sloping reef. manta-dive-giliair.com: Meno Slope All Levels. oceans5dive.com: west Gili Meno, max 20m, hawksbill/green turtles, snapper, puffer, batfish. divessi.com lists site. Depth corrected to 20m (oceans5dive.com). Difficulty set to Beginner per manta-dive-giliair.com 'All Levels' classification.

tags.name: Meno Wall
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Wall confirmed. bluemarlindive.com: avg 14m, max 22m, steeply sloping with near-vertical section; moray eels, lionfish, turtles. oceans5dive.com: north-west Gili Meno, max 25m, excellent night dive, Spanish dancers, crabs, lobsters, prawns, scorpionfish. gilidivers.com: two-wall structure, 10-13m and 14-24m. Difficulty set to Beginner per 'All Levels' across operators. Depth updated to 25m (oceans5dive.com max).

tags.name: Mirkos Reef
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Difficulty corrected from Intermediate to Advanced — 35m depth exceeds OW certification limit (30m). No 3-source validation found for this site by name. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Shallow Turbo
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: trawangandive.com: Shallow Turbo, all levels, drift dive with Biorocks, turtles, schooling fish, unicorn fish, scorpionfish, ornate ghost pipefish. bluemarlindive.com: Turbo (deep/shallow) 22m avg, 32m max — Shallow Turbo shallow section. oceans5dive.com lists as beginner drift. Site type updated from reef to drift per trawangandive.com.

tags.name: Shark Point
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Glenn Nusa tugboat wreck CONFIRMED by 3 independent sources: terumbudivers.com, divecentralgili.com, manta-dive-giliair.com. Sunk February/March 2016, ~22-29m long, lies at 28m on sandy bottom between Halik and Shark Point. Requires Advanced OW (30m depth). Difficulty corrected from Intermediate to Advanced — wreck at 28m, canyons to 50m per bluemarlindive.com/trawangandive.com.

tags.name: Simons Reef
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Confirmed as advanced deep reef. bluemarlindive.com: series of 8 seamounts, 25m avg, 40m max, pygmy seahorse. oceans5dive.com: north-east Gili Meno, 30m max, varied corals with sandy bottom between sea mounds. trawangandive.com: Advanced OW+. Depth updated to 40m (bluemarlindive.com). Advanced confirmed.

tags.name: Segaluh
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: No 3-source validation found for this site by name. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Teluk NBoro
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: No 3-source validation found for this site by name. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Trawangan Wall
tags.note: source is Diverschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Also listed as Halik Reef by some operators. bluemarlindive.com: Halik 15-40m with gorgonian fans and bommies on NW Gili Trawangan. trawangandive.com: Halik, drift dive with ridges and canyons, 6-40m. oceans5dive.com: steep slope with gullies, excellent drift. Depth updated to 40m (deep section). Wall/drift hybrid confirmed.

tags.name: Lombok Dive
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: No 3-source validation found for this site by name. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Vila Almarick Biorock
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Biorock structure confirmed by multiple operators as part of the Gili Trawangan east coast Biorock cluster. bluemarlindive.com: BioRocks 15m avg, 25m max, artificial structures promoting coral growth. gilidivers.com and trawangandive.com confirm Gili Eco Trust Biorock network since 2006. Individual structure name confirmed via OSM data; structure specifics (named for adjacent Vila Almarick resort) plausible.

tags.name: Bale Sampan Biorock
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Biorock cluster confirmed. bluemarlindive.com, gilidivers.com, trawangandive.com all reference the Gili Eco Trust east coast Biorock network. Individual structure names from OSM; cluster existence is confirmed.

tags.name: Samba Vilas Biorock
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Biorock cluster confirmed. bluemarlindive.com, gilidivers.com, trawangandive.com all reference the Gili Eco Trust east coast Biorock network. Individual structure names from OSM; cluster existence is confirmed.

tags.name: Trawangan Dive Biorock
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Trawangan Dive operator confirmed via trawangandive.com. Biorock cluster confirmed by bluemarlindive.com and gilidivers.com. Trawangan Dive is a named Gili Trawangan operator with an active conservation program (Gili Eco Trust).

tags.name: Gili Divers Biorock
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Gili Divers operator confirmed at gilidivers.com with dive site listings. Biorock cluster confirmed by bluemarlindive.com and trawangandive.com. Gili Divers is a named Gili Trawangan operator participating in the Biorock program.

tags.name: Turtle Point
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-13: Corrected difficulty from Beginner to Intermediate — 35m depth exceeds OW limits (30m max). Multiple operators (manta-dive.com, trawangandive.com) confirm depth 10-35m, suitable 'for all levels' but 35m section requires Advanced. Intermediate is the appropriate overall rating. Site type corrected from reef to pinnacle (confirmed as underwater hill/pinnacle by manta-dive.com, trawangandive.com).
